76064.subject: In praise of Scandinavia’s risky and dirty playgrounds
76064.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzl9AAcAAAAABBO8umP1UfLX5kzwLrBhkncItOI4wb9Tu4DzUehGD7afxBDum9Xq7lQdrazFHGZlHXSsma_3U6tXTxCRwzoTWP-Yjl94F90cCm8C-JEkLgtf1Q 

July 16th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzl9AAcAAAAABBO8umP2Od9oBS94UKGNmNzy99aFLz8V1q9tAyErZGAjUI65Pj4Q-c6gCQJHV5W8NsDCGOoHn0jO10iyRcgy-2b4YXMcjd0pACNaH3PB0fyYow 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzl9AAcAAAAABBO8umP36Vgcfq4auZGKGj_dkCWR55WbWuI09Q8mi9c3ZDuU1QN78hhqZkFHYdlslmopyLfDIUZIV8t49MAOpxz2d1sOYyHouSedjg6emet5Ag 


 


 
 

Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



 Would you give your child a knife or an axe and send her off to play? Parents do just that at Valbyparken, a playground in Copenhagen. This is not the beginning of a Nordic noir. Rather, encouraging children to learn about risk can do them a world of good, 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mzl9AAcAAAAABBO8umP4lZXXriHPOIRvmglTcbNhET72u2U6gnsZJS6XN9w5sPK7fSA11TQdPbCoFczI1npUcdh2jQa9vGSLYYsZUHOHTvV6QuE_xWa7 
our Charlemagne columnist thinks .
 


 America and Iran are fighting again, after hardliners in Iran’s regime demanded more from America than it was willing to offer. Donald Trump made a mistake by starting this war. But now he must stick it out, 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsIm

🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Institutional adoption hits a milestone with T. Rowe Price's ETP debut, while escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East drive market uncertainty. AI hardware demand and regulatory clarity remain central themes for investors. 💰T. Rowe Price debuts first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETP on NYSE T. Rowe Price has launched an actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETP on the NYSE, marking a major leap for institutional access. This move signifies a pivotal shift in how traditional finance interacts with diverse digital asset portfolios. Read full story 🚨US projectiles strike areas around Iran’s Qeshm Island as Strait of Hormuz tensions escalate Tensions reached a boiling point as US projectiles hit areas near Iran's Qeshm Island, threatening global energy stability. The escalation is forcing crypto and oil markets to reassess geopolitical risk premiums and potential sanctions evasion risks. See details 📈Taiwan Semiconductor beats earnings expectations, forecasts $45B revenue next quarter TSMC has outperformed earnings forecasts, projecting massive revenue growth driven by the global AI and crypto hardware boom. This highlights the critical role of semiconductor supply chains in the future of digital asset mining and AI infrastructure. Read full story 🏛️The Clarity Act is the most important consumer protection effort in years The Blockchain Association's CEO argues that the Clarity Act represents a crucial step in establishing robust consumer protections without stifling innovation. The legislation aims to prevent future market crises through clearer regulatory frameworks. Read full story ⚔️Robinhood tackled Coinbase head-on then immediately inherited Base’s biggest problem As Robinhood’s new blockchain competes for liquidity and users, it faces similar scalability and social product hurdles as Coinbase’s Base network. The rivalry underscores the shifting landscape of Ethereum Layer-2 adoption among retail-focused platforms. See details 🤖Runta raises $20M at $100M valuation from Andreessen Horowitz to build guardrails for AI agents Runta secured $20 million in funding led by a16z to develop essential security frameworks and "guardrails" for autonomous AI agents. The investment underscores the growing demand for secure and controlled AI deployment in decentralized ecosystems. See de

76061.subject:
Bybit Recognized for Innovation and Strategic Leadership at Peru
 Blockchain Conference 2026
76061.body:
Bybit Learn

Автор: Bybit


Автор: Bybit

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/bybit-recognized-innovation-strategic-leadership-peru-blockchain-julge?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSjavN2bRTmiOYTfvBjBMLQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2w8FR4xg3gLYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrnn9v59~sp-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrnn9v59-sp
  
Bybit has received two industry awards at the Peru Blockchain Conference 2026, reinforcing its growing role in Latin America’s digital asset ecosystem. The company was honored with the Excellence in Innovation for Trading & Web3 Ecosystems award and the Best Strategic Leadership for Latin America award. The recognition highlights Bybit’s continued investment in product innovation, user experience, and practical financial solutions for users across the region. At the center of this momentum is Bybit’s broader mission to bridge digital assets with everyday finance. Products such as the Bybit Card are helping users bring crypto into real-world spending, with benefits including 100% cashback on eligible subscription services such as Netflix and Spotify, as well as a limited-time 10% cashback on eligible purchases during the first month after activation. “These awards reflect our commitment to turning innovation into real-world value for our users,” said Patricio Mesri, Country Manager for Spanish speaking Latin America at Bybit. “Financial freedom should be more than a marketing slogan. It should be a tangible benefit people experience every day. While traditional financial services often remain constrained by national borders, Bybit is building a global financial ecosystem that gives people greater access, flexibility, and control over how they save, spend, and grow their wealth.” Patricio also joined a featured panel discussion on the future of Peru’s crypto ecosystem and the outlook for digital asset adoption across Latin America. During the session, he emphasized that the next phase of crypto adoption will be driven not only by investment opportunities, but by practical financial utility that gives users more freedom and accessibility in daily life. Bybit’s integrated ecosystem is designed to support that shift. From international payments and digital asset spending through the Bybit Card to multiple payment methods, earning opportunities, and access to global markets, Bybit brings key financial capabilities together in one platform. The discussion also highlighted education as a critical driver of long-term adoption across Latin America. “Education and trust are essential to long-term adoption,” Patricio added. “When people understand how digital assets work and have access to secure, intuitive products, they gain the confidence to participate in
